title: nepeta baytopii
intro: Nepeta baytopii, also known as Turkish catmint, is a plant species in the mint family (Lamiaceae) that is native to Turkey. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nepeta baytopii include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Nepeta baytopii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various ailments, including insomnia, restlessness, and coughs.
